children.value: の両辺の条件付き期待値をとると、外生性が満たされるとき、

children.html: E(Yi∣Xi)=E(α+βXi+ui∣Xi)=α+βE(Xi∣Xi)⏟=Xi+E(ui∣Xi)⏟=0=α+βXi\begin{align} \mathrm{E}(Y_i \mid X_i) &=\mathrm{E}(\alpha+\beta X_i + u_i \mid X_i)\\ &=\alpha + \beta \underbrace{ \mathrm{E}(X_i \mid X_i) }_{=X_i} + \underbrace{\mathrm{E}\left(u_i \mid X_i\right)}_{=0}\\ &=\alpha+\beta X_i \end{align}E(Yi​∣Xi​)​=E(α+βXi​+ui​∣Xi​)=α+β=Xi​E(Xi​∣Xi​)​​+=0E(ui​∣Xi​)​​=α+βXi​​​
